headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 37 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 37 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 14 critical, 10 high, 8 medium, 7 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR); plus 21 other bases. 8 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, low cloud base and mist  — most notably around Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) and Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS). Network hotspots: Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH), Trieste–Friuli Venezia Giulia (TRS/LIPQ), Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) and 32 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, mist and snow / blowing snow. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 37 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — CRIT: fog; snow; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: strong gusts risk; cloud base around 400 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 300 m, RVR down to 400 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 250 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — CRIT: mist; snow; strong gusts risk and 18 others. Worst affected now: Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 400 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Trieste–Friuli Venezia Giulia (TRS/LIPQ) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 150 m, RVR down to 500 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 250 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 275 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Palanga (PLQ/EYPA) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; crosswind limitation risk (drivers: approach minima limits, crosswind limitations, cold-temperature performance penalties) and 31 others. Changed since last run: London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT), Solidarity Szczecin–Goleniów (SZZ/EPSC), Warsaw Chopin (WAW/EPWA), Sphinx (SPX/HESX), Almaty (ALA/UAAA), Varna (VAR/LBWN), Marrakesh Menara (RAK/GMMX), Kraków John Paul II (KRK/EPKK) and 2 others.
